message:
⚡ Memoize GPU card nested maps + CardAIActions to prevent re-renders (#10668) (#10669)

Extract GPUNodeAIActions as a React.memo component with useMemo on
issues and additionalContext arrays, preventing unnecessary child
re-renders when GPU node data hasn't changed.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
